description: v1.3.0 authz-recovery data. Re-inserts authz grants that the moca-iavl commit-time bug (reformatted-root GetNode miss; cosmos/iavl#1007/#1009) dropped from the merkle tree at mainnet block 17,123,239. Affected grants are still present in live state (no-proof queries return them) but are UNREACHABLE via merkle traversal, so proof (prove=true) queries panic and a state-synced node never receives them at all. Generated off-chain with cmd/iavl_audit against a block-synced sentry at version 18,271,389 (2026-06-10). The audit checked all 34 substores: ONLY authz was damaged (4 leaves). evm (12,496 leaves), sp (2,447,617), staking (10,043), acc, bank and every other store were fully reachable.

moca_2288-1.note: mainnet — 4 unreachable authz grants confirmed by cmd/iavl_audit. All GenericAuthorization, no expiration.

moca_5151-1.note: devnet-2 — probed 2026-06-09: all real authz grants reachable, no merkle damage. The grants below are SYNTHETIC test entries (not dropped grants) added in v1.3.0-rc1 to exercise the authz-recovery handler end-to-end on devnet before mainnet. All GenericAuthorization, no expiration, so they are deterministic to re-insert.

moca_222888-1.note: testnet-1 — not yet audited with cmd/iavl_audit. Left empty (no-op) until audited; re-run the audit and populate before relying on a testnet upgrade.
